description: CloudTrail is correctly configured. Logging is enabled, multi-region logging is enabled, and log file validation is enabled.
business_context: Tracks AWS activity for manufacturing cloud resources, including storage, databases, IAM changes, and server configuration changes.

description: CloudTrail logging is enabled, but multi-region logging or log validation is missing. Audit logging exists but does not fully meet the professional baseline.
business_context: Tracks AWS activity for manufacturing systems but has incomplete audit protection settings.

description: Dangerous CloudTrail misconfiguration. CloudTrail logging is disabled, so AWS account activity may not be properly audited.
business_context: Should track AWS activity for manufacturing resources, but logging is disabled.
